# freeswitch_conference_status (Data Source)

Live participants of a running conference (via ESL `conference xml_list`).

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Live participants of a running conference (running=false when idle).
data "freeswitch_conference_status" "standup" {
  name = "standup"
}

output "standup_members" {
  value = [for m in data.freeswitch_conference_status.standup.members : m.caller_id_number]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String)

### Read-Only

- `member_count` (Number)
- `members` (Attributes List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--members))
- `run_time` (Number)
- `running` (Boolean)

<a id="nestedatt--members"></a>
### Nested Schema for `members`

Read-Only:

- `caller_id_name` (String)
- `caller_id_number` (String)
- `can_hear` (Boolean)
- `can_speak` (Boolean)
- `has_video` (Boolean)
- `id` (String)
- `talking` (Boolean)
